post_study_work_visa.name: Long-Term Visit Pass (LTVP) / Employment Pass
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Must secure job offer for Employment Pass. Minimum salary S$5,000/month. No lottery — merit-based.

language_requirement: English (primary business language in Singapore). No additional language requirement.
scholarship_availability: Low to moderate — NUS and NTU offer government-funded scholarships with service bonds (3-6 years). INSEAD has its own scholarship programs.
path_to_pr: Employment Pass → PR application after 6 months of working. High approval rate for MBA graduates from top schools.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE required at all programs. No waiver options.
